channel.title: Language on Sleep as Android Docs
channel.description: Recent content in Language on Sleep as Android Docs

item.title: Translation
item.description:
Sleep as Android is translated to many world languages, thanks to our volunteer translators. We could never do that without you!

Can you help us with the translations?#

There are new features added all the time which need new strings, which in turn need to be translated. Can you give us a hand with it? Please ask for permission to access our translation spreadsheets:

  • link:Sleep as Android Translation Spreadsheet
  • link:SleepCloud Translation Spreadsheet
  • link:BabySleep Translation Spreadsheet
  • link:Twilight Translation Spreadsheet
  • link:Digital Detox Translation Spreadsheet

We use link:Translate the Sheet to simplify the translation for us and the volunteers.
